source_truth.role_note: Upstream early-signal monitor and universal intake engine: ingests, classifies, and routes public-interest items across six domains to sibling producers; the parent hub (thehub-pr) discovers, validates, and aggregates the canonical export; officialized matters hand off to moneysweep-pr.
source_truth.intake_doctrine: scripts/build_signal_ledger.py bridges live RSS intake (real, non-synthetic) into the signal ledger; the synthetic seed remains only as a contract fixture. PR pre-officialization source families remain future intake.

hub_callable_commands.setup: [ -d ../thehub-pr ] || git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/jotaele44/thehub-pr.git ../thehub-pr; python -m pip install uv && uv pip install --system -e .[dev]

resolved_conditions: root federation.json manifest present and Hub-schema conformant
source registry and signal schema defined; CI manifest gate present
universal intake engine (src/centinelas) merged: ingest/classify/route across six domains with hub_parent logging

real (non-synthetic) signal intake live: build_signal_ledger.py bridged 274 real RSS signals (2026-07-03); federation_export --mode production passed and thehub hub validate-package -> VALID; flipped per operator-approved follow-up sweep

notes: Every item is also logged to hub_parent regardless of domain labels.
